Hello, World!

Jul 25, 2018

This is my first post using the jekyll templating engine, which I’ve planned to be using going forwards. I recently switched over from hugo to because of compatibility issues with MathJax plugin.

Anyways, this is the blog/documentation website where I plan to document my projects that I’ve done, and post some random pieces of code that I push to my GitHub.

Built with Jekyll using a fork of Julia theme.
